list.name: replay_date
list.label: Replay Date Bucket (UTC)
list.description: Cassandra partition key for the trips table. Defaults to the UTC date at the start of the dashboard time range (today for the live demo). Override to inspect a historical replay date.

panels.title: Active Vehicles (latest 30s window)
panels.description: Sum across all 16 Casablanca zones of the most recent demand_zones.active_vehicles snapshot. Live data from Flink Demand Aggregator.

targets.target: SELECT zone_id, active_vehicles FROM taasim.demand_zones WHERE city='casablanca' AND zone_id=1 LIMIT 1

panels.title: Pending Requests (latest 30s window)
panels.description: Sum across all 16 zones of pending trip requests in the most recent demand_zones snapshot.

panels.title: Trips by Status (replay date)
panels.description: Breakdown of trips in the selected replay_date partition. matched = Flink Trip Matcher assigned a taxi; no_vehicle = no suitable vehicle within adjacent zones.

targets.target: SELECT trip_id, status FROM taasim.trips WHERE city='casablanca' AND date_bucket='${replay_date}' LIMIT 500

panels.title: Trips Today (replay date)
panels.description: Total trips written to Cassandra for the replay_date partition (capped at 500 for display).

targets.target: SELECT trip_id FROM taasim.trips WHERE city='casablanca' AND date_bucket='${replay_date}' LIMIT 500
